title: Tech Internships 2026
tagline: Software engineering, data science, security, product, and design internships in the United States. Listings come straight from company career pages, so every link is a real, open posting.
description: 2026–2027 tech internships in the US, updated daily. Software engineering, data science, product, and design intern roles with salaries.
keywords: tech internships (software engineering, data science, security, product, design) in the United States

siblings.label: New Grad Software Engineer Jobs: entry-level roles for graduates
Remote Tech Jobs: fully remote engineering roles
AI and ML Jobs: AI-first roles, classified daily

faq.q: How often is this list updated?
faq.a: Once a day. A GitHub Action pulls new internship postings from Dreamwork's public API, which crawls company career pages directly (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, and others). Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>F</kbd> for software engineering, data science, ML, product, or design roles.

faq.q: Which season are these internships for?
faq.a: Whatever companies are hiring for right now. As of mid-2026 that is mostly Fall 2026, Spring 2027, and early Summer 2027 openings. New season postings appear here the day the crawler first sees them.
The companion list, New Grad Software Engineer Jobs, covers entry-level full-time roles with the same daily refresh.

faq.q: Can a tool apply to these for me?
faq.a: Yes. Dreamwork matches your resume against every listing here, tailors each application, and can submit them for you. Seeing your matches is free.
